html:
Steel Wool is an Item obtained by killing a Ewecus. It is a major crafting ingredient of the War Saddle and the Brush. It can also be burned, providing the same burn time as a Log.

Trivia

  • Steel Wool was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Stuck in the Middle with Ewe update. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • Steel Wool is considered to be part of A New Reign, even though it was introduced before the official start of the beta branch.

“Scratchy metal fibres.”
–Wilson
“Make a spark, it'll still burn.”
–Willow
“Is like my arm hair.”
–Wolfgang
“This offers no hope of warmth.”
–Wendy
“METALLIC ORGANIC FIBRE. DOES NOT COMPUTE”
–WX-78
“It has a variety of household uses.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll put the shine back on yer axe.”
–Woodie
“Someone should use this to clean something.”
–Maxwell
“Compositionally unique from wool I'm used to.”
–Wagstaff
“It cöuld easily best regular wööl in cömbat.”
–Wigfrid
“Scratchy, like father's beard!”
–Webber
“It's too hard to make a sweater out of.”
–Walani
“I used to use this to scrub dishes.”
–Warly
“'Tis a wonder 't'is na rusted.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS THE SCRATCHY WOOL.”
–Wilba
“Horkbeast clothes”
–Wormwood
“Of course that sheep would have scratchy wool.”
–Wheeler
“At least there's SOME steel around here.”
–Winona
“Oh my, that's scratchy!”
–Wortox
“Scratchy!”
–Wurt
“For making especially scratchy sweaters.”
–Walter
“Some things are taken very literally around here.”
–Wanda
Steel Wool is an Item obtained by killing a Ewecus. It is a major crafting ingredient of the War Saddle and the Brush. It can also be burned, providing the same burn time as a Log.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Steel Wool was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Stuck in the Middle with Ewe update. It was later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
Steel Wool is considered to be part of A New Reign, even though it was introduced before the official start of the beta branch.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Len Thép là Vật phẩm thu được khi giết Ewecus. Nó là nguyên liệu chế tạo chính của Yên Chiến và Cây Chổi. Nó cũng có thể được ghi, cung cấp thời gian ghi tương tự như Nhật ký.

'''Steel Wool''' is an [[Item]] obtained by killing a [[Ewecus]]. It is a major crafting ingredient of the [[Saddle|War Saddle]] and the [[Brush]]. It can also be burned, providing the same burn time as a [[Log]].
== {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Steel Wool
|count1 = 4
|item2 = Rabbit
|count2 = 4
|item3 = Log
|count3 = 10
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = War Saddle}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Steel Wool
|item2 = Walrus Tusk
|item3 = Gold Nugget
|count3 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Brush}}

=={{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Steel Wool was introduced to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve Together/Version History#December 2nd, 2014 - Stuck in the Middle with Ewe|Stuck in the Middle with Ewe]]'' update. It was later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update.
* Steel Wool is considered to be part of ''[[A New Reign]]'', even though it was introduced before the official start of the beta branch.
